title: Little question about dvd pack and ep 25
display_title: Little question about dvd pack and ep 25
wikitext:
[]: Little question about dvd pack and ep 25'             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu May 17, 2007 2:06 pm Ok, here's my question... I have the old evangelion movie box, with the VHS of death and rebirth, and the VHS of EoE. So I have both versions of episodes 25'. Actually some time ago when it was released I bough a french dvd box with death and rebirth and the end. But I didn't really appreciate that the ep 25' in death and rebirth was not the theatrical version (the old unfinished one, witout eva-02's voice, without sparks on the pyramid, etc), it was "finished", EoE style. I was the wondering if I could get these two different versions on dvd, and I saw that today: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KIBA-91401 I was wondering... Are these versions inside? I mean, I really wanna be able to see the real "death and rebirth" without the adds they put in the End. Ep 25' of DaR isn't much of interest if it's just half of EoE... It's a bit confusing, but I hope I'm kinda clear though haha...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 17, 2007 2:44 pm What Mangle got as Rebirth is really ReAir....The stuff you see in Air just copy and pasted into Rebirth, NOT what was the real deal, which you can find here: http://evacommentary.org/omake/omake.html All the versions of Death, States-wise, is Death(true)^2; the original Death was never released on video/LD/DVD while Death(true) was only released in Japan. And fyi, there was a video version and the theartical version of EoE, you can read more about on MDwig's site. (I don't have the link onhand right now.)

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu May 17, 2007 3:00 pm So what you basically mean is, the VHS version I have of Death and Rebirth simply doesn't exist on DVD? It's really depressing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 17, 2007 3:44 pm Jinroh, what country are you in?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu May 17, 2007 3:49 pm Switzerland. But the box I'm talking about is Japanese anway. The big one with a giant red Rei holding the black moon in her hands.
